text.message: where do you ski
I am on the east coast but I use to live in Denver
Went to Chamonix last year which was sick
gotcha, im in philly so i see a lot of poconos
ahhh in france. my friend went there. seems dangerous lowkey
nice I am in Monmouth county nj
awesome
once you ski out west its hard to do the east
Yea I went to Boulder this summer and those mountains look incredible
def gonna go back for the winter
its a whole other world
You have to go
i will
do you miss it
100% I had a lot of fun and ski 40 days that season
jeez, lmao
i liked the vibe. lot of hikers, rock climbers, etc.
how old are you
u?
nice, been in philly my whole life so im ready to get away
CO is a great spot with a lot of good people
I have a lot of friends still in Denver
yea i have fam in fort collins
very cool make the move
oo idk if id move there
im more of an abroad guy
tokyo or europer
we'll see. still finishing college
what college
Temple U
I went to TCNJ had a few buddys at temple
Quite a ways away from Denver haha
yeah my wife was a travel nurse so we jumped around
